subcodes.first_line: Deliver my greeting and praise and my abundant longings to my beloved ones in that city (New York) which hath become the City of the Covenant and the town of the Love of God
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @unity in diversity, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
